display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
TRIAGE AGENT
Categorizes urgency, type, and customer tier
Tools: CRM lookup
Model: Haiku (fast)
Output: {urgency, type, tier, routing_suggestion}

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
TECHNICAL AGENT
Tools:
- Error logs
- Docs
- GitHub
Handles:
- Bugs
- API issues
- Integrations
Model: Sonnet

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
BILLING AGENT
Tools:
- Billing API
- Invoice sys
- Refund API
Handles:
- Payments
- Refunds
- Upgrades
Model: Haiku

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
KNOWLEDGE BASE AGENT
Tools:
- KB Search
- Past tickets
Handles:
- Common Qs
- How-tos
- FAQs
Model: Haiku

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
ROUTING AGENT
Determines final destination based on all analysis
Routes to: Auto-response, Human team, Escalation
Tools: Ticket system, Email
Model: Haiku
